message.content:
Create the following WPF UI files for the PortableTestMachine2 project (.NET 8.0, C#, WPF). This is a portable motor CW/CCW current measurement inspection system. All code comments in Korean. Resolution: 1024x768.

Base path: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\휴대용 검사기\PortableTestMachine\PortableTestMachine\PortableTestMachine2\

The UI theme follows WELD_MONITOR_IM dark theme:
- Background: #1E1E1E
- Card/Panel: #2B2B2B  
- Hover: #363636
- Border: #3A3A3A
- Text primary: #FFFFFF
- Text secondary: #9CA3AF
- Current value accent: #60A5FA (blue)
- Voltage value accent: #4ADE80 (green)
- START button: #1A3D2E background, #22C55E border
- STOP button: #3B1818 background, #EF4444 border
- Settings button: #2D2D3D background
- CornerRadius: 6px
- Monospace font for values: Consolas

## File 1: App.xaml
- Application x:Class="PortableTestMachine2.App"
- StartupUri="MainWindow.xaml"
- Application.Resources with global styles:
  - Window style: Background=#1E1E1E, Foreground=#FFFFFF
  - Button base style: Background=#333333, Foreground=#FFFFFF, BorderBrush=#3A3A3A, Padding=12,6, FontSize=13, CornerRadius=6 (use template), Hover=#444444
  - TextBox style: Background=#2B2B2B, Foreground=#FFFFFF, BorderBrush=#3A3A3A, CaretBrush=White, Padding=6,4
  - ComboBox style: Background=#2B2B2B, Foreground=#FFFFFF, BorderBrush=#3A3A3A
  - DataGrid styles: Background=Transparent, RowBackground=#252525, AlternatingRowBackground=#2B2B2B, Foreground=#FFFFFF, GridLinesVisibility=Horizontal, HorizontalGridLinesBrush=#3A3A3A, HeaderBackground=#333333, HeaderForeground=#9CA3AF, SelectionBackground=#363636
  - Label style: Foreground=#FFFFFF
  - Border card style (x:Key="CardStyle"): Background=#2B2B2B, BorderBrush=#3A3A3A, BorderThickness=1, CornerRadius=6, Padding=12

## File 2: App.xaml.cs
- namespace PortableTestMachine2
- OnStartup: call PathManager.EnsureDirectories()
- Wire DispatcherUnhandledException → Logger.WriteCrashLog + MessageBox + Shutdown
- Wire AppDomain.CurrentDomain.UnhandledException → Logger.WriteCrashLog

## File 3: MainWindow.xaml (1024x768, NoResize, WindowStartupLocation=CenterScreen)
- Title="PORTABLE INSPECTION SYSTEM"
- Icon="ftech.ico"

Layout (DockPanel):
```
TOP: Header bar (50px, #2B2B2B background)
  - Image source=Assets/Ftech.png (height 36, margin left 12)
  - TextBlock "PORTABLE INSPECTION SYSTEM" (FontSize 18, Bold, #FFFFFF, centered)

BOTTOM: Button bar (50px, #2B2B2B border top)
  - StackPanel Horizontal, center:
    - Button "AUTO SET" (Background=#2D2D3D, width 120)
    - Button "AUTO START" (x:Name="btnAutoStart", Background=#1A3D2E, width 120)
    - Button "AUTO STOP" (x:Name="btnAutoStop", Background=#3B1818, width 120)
    - Button "REPORT" (Background=#2D2D3D, width 120)
    - Separator (stretch)
    - Button "EXIT" (Background=#3B1818, width 80, HorizontalAlignment=Right)
  All buttons have margin 4

CENTER: Grid with 2 rows, 2 columns
  Row 0 (Height=3*): chart area + right panel
  Row 1 (Height=2*): results + log

  [Row 0, Col 0] Chart area:
    - Border with CardStyle
    - lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chart" with:
      - Dark background axes (Axis labels #9CA3AF, separator lines #3A3A3A)
      - Will be configured in code-behind

  [Row 0, Col 1] Right panel (Width=220):
    - StackPanel with 2 card borders:
    
    Card 1 "Condition":
      - TextBlock "- Condition -" (#9CA3AF, center, margin bottom 8)
      - Grid 2 rows:
        - "Voltage" label (#9CA3AF) + TextBlock x:Name="txtVoltage" ("0.0 V", FontFamily=Consolas, FontSize=22, Foreground=#4ADE80)
        - "Current" label (#9CA3AF) + TextBlock x:Name="txtCurrent" ("0.000 A", FontFamily=Consolas, FontSize=22, Foreground=#60A5FA)

    Card 2 "Manual Control":
      - TextBlock "- Manual Control -" (#9CA3AF, center)
      - StackPanel:
        - Grid 2 cols: ToggleButton x:Name="btnCW" "CW" (width 80, height 40) + ToggleButton x:Name="btnCCW" "CCW" (width 80, height 40)
      - Separator line
      - TextBlock "- Volt Setting -" (#9CA3AF, center)
      - StackPanel Horizontal:
        - TextBox x:Name="txtManualVolt" (width 80, FontFamily=Consolas)
        - TextBlock "V" (margin left 4, vertical center)
        - Button "SET" (width 50, margin left 8)

  [Row 1, Col 0] Results DataGrid:
    - Border with CardStyle
    - DataGrid x:Name="dgResults" AutoGenerateColumns=False, IsReadOnly=True, HeadersVisibility=Column
    - Columns: No (50), Info (140), Volt(V) (80), Current Max(A) (120), Time(s) (80)

  [Row 1, Col 1] System Log:
    - Border with CardStyle  
    - TextBox x:Name="txtLog" (IsReadOnly, TextWrapping=Wrap, VerticalScrollBarVisibility=Auto, Background=Transparent, BorderThickness=0)
```

## File 4: MainWindow.xaml.cs
- Fields: AppConfig _config, PowerSupplyService _supply, IoBoardService _ioBoard, InspectionContext _context, InspectionEngine _engine
- System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherTimer _pollTimer (10ms interval), _monitorTimer (200ms for idle graph update)
- ObservableCollection<MeasureResult> _results (bound to dgResults)
- LiveCharts data: ObservableCollection<ObservablePoint> _chartPoints
- LineSeries<ObservablePoint> _series

Constructor:
- InitializeComponent()
- Load config
- Init chart (LineSeries with blue stroke #60A5FA, no geometry, smooth line)
  - X axis: Name="Time(s)", label color #9CA3AF, separator color #3A3A3A
  - Y axis: Name="Current(A)", label color #9CA3AF, separator color #3A3A3A
- Init _results, bind to dgResults.ItemsSource
- Init services: _supply = new(), _ioBoard = new()
- Init inspection: _context = new(), _engine = new(supply, ioBoard, context)
- Wire engine events to Dispatcher.Invoke UI updates
- Wire button clicks

Loaded event:
- Connect serial ports from config (log success/fail)
- Start _pollTimer

_pollTimer_Tick (10ms):
- _supply.Poll()
- _ioBoard.SendDoFrame()
- Update txtCurrent with _supply.CurrentValue (format "0.000 A")
- Update txtVoltage

Button handlers:
- btnAutoSet_Click: open AutoSettingsWindow as dialog, reload config after
- btnAutoStart_Click: load config values into _context, _engine.Start(), change button colors
- btnAutoStop_Click: _engine.Stop(), restore button colors
- btnReport_Click: ExcelExporter.Export(_context.Results, PathManager.GetExcelFileName()), log path
- btnExit_Click: _engine.Stop(), disconnect ports, Application.Current.Shutdown()
- btnCW toggle: if checked _ioBoard.CW() else if neither checked _ioBoard.OFF()
- btnCCW toggle: if checked _ioBoard.CCW() else if neither checked _ioBoard.OFF()
- btnSetVolt_Click: parse txtManualVolt, set _supply.TargetVolt

Engine event handlers (all Dispatcher.Invoke):
- OnLogMessage: append to txtLog (keep max 15 lines), prepend timestamp
- OnDataPointAdded: add point to _chartPoints
- OnResultAdded: add to _results collection
- OnCompleted: log, restore buttons
- OnStepChanged: log step name

WriteLog helper: prepend [HH:mm:ss] to message, append to txtLog, if lines > 15 clear old

## File 5: AutoSettingsWindow.xaml (500x350, NoResize, CenterOwner, dialog)
- Title="자동 검사 설정"
- WindowStyle=None, Background=#1E1E1E
- Custom title bar (Border #2B2B2B, 36px):
  - TextBlock "자동 검사 설정" (FontSize 14, margin left 12)
  - Button "X" close (right side, flat)

Content (StackPanel, margin 20):
- Grid 4 rows × 2 cols:
  - Row 0: Label "구동 전압 (V)" + TextBox x:Name="txtVolt" (FontFamily=Consolas)
  - Row 1: Label "검사 횟수" + TextBox x:Name="txtCount" (FontFamily=Consolas)
  - Row 2: Label "정지 조건" + ComboBox x:Name="cboStopMode" (Items: "CURRENT", "TIME")
  - Row 3: Label "정지 기준값" + StackPanel(TextBox x:Name="txtStopValue" + TextBlock x:Name="txtUnit" "A")
- Bottom buttons (StackPanel Horizontal, right align, margin top 20):
  - Button "저장" (Background=#1E3A5F, width 80) — PrimaryButtonStyle look
  - Button "닫기" (width 80, margin left 8)

## File 6: AutoSettingsWindow.xaml.cs
- Load: read AppConfig.Load(), populate fields
- cboStopMode_SelectionChanged: update txtUnit ("A" for CURRENT, "s" for TIME)
- Save button: validate inputs, save to AppConfig, close dialog with DialogResult=true
- Close button: close dialog
- Title bar drag: MouseLeftButtonDown → DragMove()

Write ALL 6 files. Make sure namespaces are consistent (PortableTestMachine2). Use xmlns:lvc="clr-namespace:LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF;assembly=LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF" for the chart.

input.content:
<Application x:Class="PortableTestMachine2.App"
             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             StartupUri="MainWindow.xaml">
    <Application.Resources>

        <!-- 윈도우 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="Window">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 라벨 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="Label">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 버튼 기본 스타일 (CornerRadius 6 적용 템플릿) -->
        <Style TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border"
                                Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}"
                                BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"
                                CornerRadius="6"
                                Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#555555"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <!-- 토글버튼 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="ToggleButton">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="ToggleButton">
                        <Border x:Name="border"
                                Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}"
                                BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"
                                CornerRadius="6"
                                Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsChecked" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#1A3D2E"/>
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="BorderBrush" Value="#22C55E"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <!-- 텍스트박스 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TextBox">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#2B2B2B"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="CaretBrush" Value="White"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 콤보박스 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="ComboBox">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#2B2B2B"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 데이터그리드 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252525"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2B2B2B"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 데이터그리드 컬럼 헤더 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#9CA3AF"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="8,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 데이터그리드 셀 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGridCell">
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="4,2"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#363636"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
                </Trigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 데이터그리드 행 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Style.Triggers>
                <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#363636"/>
                </Trigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 카드 스타일 (Border 용) -->
        <Style x:Key="CardStyle" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#2B2B2B"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="6"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12"/>
        </Style>

    </Application.Resources>
</Application>

input.content:
<Window x:Class="PortableTestMachine2.MainWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:lvc="clr-namespace:LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF;assembly=LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF"
        Title="PORTABLE INSPECTION SYSTEM"
        Icon="ftech.ico"
        Width="1024" Height="768"
        ResizeMode="NoResize"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
        Background="#1E1E1E">

    <DockPanel>

        <!-- 상단 헤더 바 -->
        <Border DockPanel.Dock="Top" Height="50" Background="#2B2B2B">
            <Grid>
                <!-- 좌측 로고 -->
                <Image Source="Assets/Ftech.png" Height="36" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="12,0,0,0"/>
                <!-- 중앙 타이틀 -->
                <TextBlock Text="PORTABLE INSPECTION SYSTEM"
                           FontSize="18" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#FFFFFF"
                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- 하단 버튼 바 -->
        <Border DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Height="50" Background="#2B2B2B"
                BorderBrush="#3A3A3A" BorderThickness="0,1,0,0">
            <Grid Margin="8,0">
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <Button x:Name="btnAutoSet" Content="AUTO SET"
                            Background="#2D2D3D" Width="120" Margin="4"
                            Click="btnAutoSet_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnAutoStart" Content="AUTO START"
                            Background="#1A3D2E" Width="120" Margin="4"
                            Click="btnAutoStart_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnAutoStop" Content="AUTO STOP"
                            Background="#3B1818" Width="120" Margin="4"
                            Click="btnAutoStop_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnReport" Content="REPORT"
                            Background="#2D2D3D" Width="120" Margin="4"
                            Click="btnReport_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <Button x:Name="btnExit" Content="EXIT"
                        Background="#3B1818" Width="80" Margin="4"
                        HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                        Click="btnExit_Click"/>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- 중앙 콘텐츠 -->
        <Grid Margin="8">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="3*"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="2*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="220"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- [Row 0, Col 0] 차트 영역 -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,0,4,4">
                <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chart"/>
            </Border>

            <!-- [Row 0, Col 1] 우측 패널 -->
            <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Margin="4,0,0,4">

                <!-- 카드 1: Condition -->
                <Border Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <TextBlock Text="- Condition -" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                        <Grid>
                            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                            <!-- 전압 -->
                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0"
                                       Text="Voltage" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,4"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtVoltage" Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1"
                                       Text="0.0 V" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="22"
                                       Foreground="#4ADE80" HorizontalAlignment="Right"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,4"/>

                            <!-- 전류 -->
                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"
                                       Text="Current" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,4"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtCurrent" Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"
                                       Text="0.000 A" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="22"
                                       Foreground="#60A5FA" HorizontalAlignment="Right"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,4"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>

                <!-- 카드 2: Manual Control -->
                <Border Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <TextBlock Text="- Manual Control -" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                        <!-- CW / CCW 토글 -->
                        <Grid Margin="0,0,0,8">
                            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                            <ToggleButton x:Name="btnCW" Content="CW"
                                          Width="80" Height="40" Margin="0,0,4,0"
                                          Click="btnCW_Click"/>
                            <ToggleButton x:Name="btnCCW" Content="CCW"
                                          Grid.Column="1" Width="80" Height="40" Margin="4,0,0,0"
                                          Click="btnCCW_Click"/>
                        </Grid>

                        <!-- 구분선 -->
                        <Separator Background="#3A3A3A" Margin="0,4"/>

                        <!-- 전압 설정 -->
                        <TextBlock Text="- Volt Setting -" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,8,0,8"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                            <TextBox x:Name="txtManualVolt" Width="80" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                     VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="V" Foreground="#FFFFFF" Margin="4,0,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                            <Button x:Name="btnSetVolt" Content="SET" Width="50" Margin="8,0,0,0"
                                    Click="btnSetVolt_Click"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>

            <!-- [Row 1, Col 0] 결과 데이터그리드 -->
            <Border Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,4,4,0">
                <DataGrid x:Name="dgResults"
                          AutoGenerateColumns="False"
                          IsReadOnly="True"
                          HeadersVisibility="Column"
                          CanUserResizeColumns="False"
                          CanUserReorderColumns="False"
                          SelectionMode="Single"
                          VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="No" Binding="{Binding SequenceNo}" Width="50"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Info" Binding="{Binding Info}" Width="140"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Volt(V)" Binding="{Binding Voltage, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Current Max(A)" Binding="{Binding MaxCurrent, StringFormat=F3}" Width="120"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Time(s)" Binding="{Binding ElapsedTime, StringFormat=F2}" Width="80"/>
                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                </DataGrid>
            </Border>

            <!-- [Row 1, Col 1] 시스템 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="4,4,0,0">
                <TextBox x:Name="txtLog"
                         IsReadOnly="True"
                         TextWrapping="Wrap"
                         VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                         Background="Transparent"
                         BorderThickness="0"
                         Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                         FontSize="11"/>
            </Border>
        </Grid>

    </DockPanel>
</Window>

File created successfully at: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\휴대용 검사기\PortableTestMachine\PortableTestMachine\PortableTestMachine2\MainWindow.xaml.cs

input.content:
<Window x:Class="PortableTestMachine2.AutoSettingsWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="자동 검사 설정"
        Width="500" Height="350"
        ResizeMode="NoResize"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        WindowStyle="None"
        Background="#1E1E1E"
        AllowsTransparency="True">

    <Border BorderBrush="#3A3A3A" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="6" Background="#1E1E1E">
        <DockPanel>

            <!-- 커스텀 타이틀 바 -->
            <Border DockPanel.Dock="Top" Height="36" Background="#2B2B2B"
                    CornerRadius="6,6,0,0"
                    MouseLeftButtonDown="TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown">
                <Grid>
                    <TextBlock Text="자동 검사 설정" FontSize="14" Foreground="#FFFFFF"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="12,0,0,0"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnTitleClose" Content="X"
                            HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                            Width="36" Height="36"
                            Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0"
                            Foreground="#9CA3AF" FontSize="14"
                            Click="btnClose_Click"/>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 콘텐츠 영역 -->
            <StackPanel Margin="20">

                <!-- 설정 항목 그리드 -->
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="140"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <!-- 구동 전압 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="구동 전압 (V)" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="txtVolt" Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1"
                             FontFamily="Consolas" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                             Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>

                    <!-- 검사 횟수 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="검사 횟수" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="txtCount" Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"
                             FontFamily="Consolas" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                             Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>

                    <!-- 정지 조건 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="정지 조건" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="cboStopMode" Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1"
                              Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                              SelectionChanged="cboStopMode_SelectionChanged">
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="CURRENT"/>
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="TIME"/>
                    </ComboBox>

                    <!-- 정지 기준값 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="정지 기준값" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal"
                                Margin="0,4" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBox x:Name="txtStopValue" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                 VerticalContentAlignment="Center" Width="160"/>
                        <TextBlock x:Name="txtUnit" Text="A" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                   VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0,0,0" FontSize="14"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>

                <!-- 하단 버튼 -->
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right" Margin="0,20,0,0">
                    <Button x:Name="btnSave" Content="저장"
                            Background="#1E3A5F" Width="80"
                            Click="btnSave_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnCancel" Content="닫기"
                            Width="80" Margin="8,0,0,0"
                            Click="btnClose_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>

            </StackPanel>
        </DockPanel>
    </Border>
</Window>

content.text:
빌드 성공 (0 경고, 0 오류).

생성 완료된 6개 파일:

1. **`App.xaml`** - 전역 다크 테마 스타일 (Window, Button, TextBox, ComboBox, DataGrid, ToggleButton, CardStyle Border)
2. **`App.xaml.cs`** - 전역 예외 핸들러 (DispatcherUnhandledException + AppDomain.UnhandledException -> crash.log)
3. **`MainWindow.xaml`** - 1024x768 메인 UI (헤더 바, 차트, Condition 카드, Manual Control 카드, DataGrid, 로그, 하단 버튼 바)
4. **`MainWindow.xaml.cs`** - 코드비하인드 (LiveCharts 차트 구성, 10ms 폴링 타이머, 시리얼 연결, CW/CCW 토글, 전압 설정, 자동 검사 제어, 엑셀 내보내기, 최대 15줄 로그)
5. **`AutoSettingsWindow.xaml`** - 500x350 설정 다이얼로그 (커스텀 타이틀 바, 전압/횟수/정지조건/기준값 입력)
6. **`AutoSettingsWindow.xaml.cs`** - 설정 로드/검증/저장 로직

InspectionEngine 클래스는 아직 미구현이므로 관련 코드는 TODO 주석으로 처리해 두었습니다. 엔진 구현 후 주석을 해제하면 동작합니다.
